name: Savoy Palace
highlight: Largest spa in Portugal (3,000 sqm), two rooftop infinity pools, 5 restaurants. Modern dramatic architecture with tropical plants integrated into glass and concrete.

name: Reid's Palace, A Belmond Hotel, Madeira
highlight: Iconic cliff-top hotel since 1891 where Churchill painted. Michelin-starred William Restaurant, famous afternoon tea, and pool carved into the cliff face.

name: The Cliff Bay (Porto Bay)
highlight: Direct ocean access with saltwater swimming platform, home to Il Gallo d'Oro (2 Michelin stars). Serene garden atmosphere with panoramic sea views.

name: Quinta da Casa Branca
highlight: Member of Small Luxury Hotels of the World. Set on a historic wine estate with 28,000 sqm of subtropical gardens and a banana plantation. Anti-resort elegance.

name: Quinta Jardins do Lago
highlight: Ranked #1 hotel in Funchal on TripAdvisor. Magnificent gardens with heated pool, bridge feature, and immaculate rooms with garden or sea views. Intimate and refined.

name: Quinta da Bela Vista
highlight: 5-star boutique manor house with tranquil gardens, traditional decor, and serene hilltop atmosphere. Known for warm attentive service and spa with sauna.

name: Pestana Casino Park
highlight: Oscar Niemeyer-designed 5-star on 15,000 sqm of gardens adjacent to Funchal Casino. Dramatic brutalist architecture, ocean views, and resort-scale facilities.

name: Meliá Madeira Mare
highlight: 5-star in the Lido zone with 220 rooms, most with ocean-view balconies. Infinity pool, spa, and direct access to the seafront promenade.

name: Enotel Lido
highlight: 5-star all-inclusive overlooking the Atlantic with indoor/outdoor pools, spa, sauna, and direct promenade access. One of few genuine all-inclusive options on Madeira.

name: Vidamar Resort Hotel Madeira
highlight: Oceanfront 5-star with direct Atlantic access in the Lido area. Multiple pools, large spa, and panoramic ocean views from most rooms. Great for families.

name: Castanheiro Boutique Hotel
highlight: Best value in central Funchal. Rooftop lap pool with harbour views, organic seaweed spa, and walking distance to everything. Exceptional staff consistently praised.

name: The Vine Hotel
highlight: Award-winning design hotel with wine theme. Rooftop infinity pool, UVA restaurant (French-Madeiran fusion), and Wine Therapy Spa. Minimalist modern aesthetic.

name: ARTS IN Hotel Conde Carvalhal
highlight: Charming boutique hotel in a historic building with magnificent gardens and 10,000 sqm grounds. Heated outdoor pool, spacious rooms with garden views, family-run warmth.

name: Sé Boutique Hotel
highlight: Old-world European charm meets modern boutique. Rooftop bar with city views, quirky retro atmosphere, and central location steps from the Cathedral.

name: TURIM Santa Maria Hotel
highlight: Modern 4-star in the heart of Old Town with rooftop pool and restaurant. 92 rooms with magnificent views, walking distance to painted doors street and harbour.

name: Hotel Madeira
highlight: Well-known 3-star with personalized service in Old Town. Excellent location near Mercado dos Lavradores, friendly staff, and good breakfast. Solid mid-range pick.

name: Hotel do Carmo (The Editory Garden Carmo)
highlight: Stylish mid-century modern property with rooftop pool and panoramic ocean views. 5-minute walk to farmers market. Free breakfast included. Great value.

name: Porto Santa Maria (PortoBay)
highlight: Adults-only waterfront hotel in Old Town with kitchenettes in all rooms. 30+ restaurants within 3-minute walk. Best restaurant-access location in Funchal.

name: Porto Mare (PortoBay)
highlight: All-in-one resort with 5 pools, 4 restaurants, spa, and sports facilities. Free shuttle to Funchal center. Great for families wanting resort-style amenities.

name: The Views Baía (Adults Only)
highlight: Adults-only 4-star with full-service spa, indoor and outdoor pools, and 2 restaurants. Scenic beauty with excellent amenities and top-notch service.

name: Hotel Baía Azul
highlight: Newly renovated 4-star, 4-minute walk from beachfront. Consistently praised for staff, excellent breakfasts, and spectacular sea views. Excellent value.

name: Pestana CR7 Funchal
highlight: Cristiano Ronaldo collaboration with Pestana Group. Contemporary lifestyle hotel 300m from marina with rooftop pool. Modern design, harbour views, great for sports fans.

name: Hotel Girassol - Suite Hotel
highlight: 4-star suite hotel with separate living areas in most rooms. Seafront location, pool with bar, expansive breakfast, and spa. Good space for the price.

name: Madeira Panoramico Hotel
highlight: Hillside 4-star with stunning panoramic views of Funchal bay and mountains. Two pools, tennis, squash, and free shuttle service. Great value with a view.

name: Quinta do Monte Panoramic Gardens
highlight: Historic manor house in Monte village surrounded by mature gardens. 2-minute walk to cable car terminal, indoor pool, and Monte Garden restaurant. Best value hillside stay.

name: Quinta Mirabela
highlight: Intimate boutique hotel with breathtaking views of Funchal and the ocean. Tranquil hillside setting with tasteful public spaces and personable service.

name: Pestana Village Garden Hotel
highlight: 4-star garden resort with traditional Madeiran architecture spread across 5,000 sqm of tropical gardens. Fitness facilities, pool, and quiet residential setting.

name: Pestana Promenade
highlight: Modern 4-star on the oceanfront promenade. Contemporary design, ocean-view rooms, rooftop pool, and direct access to Lido seafront walking path.

name: Pestana Churchill Bay
highlight: 4-star boutique in the fishing village Churchill loved to paint. Panoramic harbour views, modern design blending with historic setting, and rooftop pool.

name: Pestana Fisherman Village
highlight: Stylish boutique in the historic fishing harbour surrounded by banana plantation hillsides. Rooftop panoramic pool, excellent breakfast, and tasteful rustic-modern design.

name: Estalagem da Ponta do Sol
highlight: Design hotel on a cliff edge above the village, renovated from a 19th-century quinta. 54 rooms with ocean/cliff/village views, outdoor and indoor pools, and the digital nomad hub town at your feet.

name: Escarpa - The Madeira Hideaway
highlight: Exclusive hideaway perched atop a dramatic escarpment with infinity pool and hot tub overlooking the Atlantic. Rooms and apartments available. Tranquility and natural beauty.

name: Saccharum Resort & Spa (Savoy Signature)
highlight: 5-star design resort on the southwest coast next to Madeira's only sandy beach. Rooftop infinity pool, premium spa, and spectacular west-facing sunset views from the Fly bar.

name: Calheta Beach Hotel (Savoy Signature)
highlight: One of few all-inclusive options in Madeira, directly on Calheta's golden sand beach. 153 rooms with balconies, 3 restaurants, beach bar, and marina views.

name: Hotel Atrio
highlight: Family-run boutique hotel above Calheta with 22 rooms, 10,000 sqm garden, and heated pool. Levada trail starts at the property. Peaceful hillside retreat with mountain views.

name: Aqua Natura Bay
highlight: 4-star right beside Porto Moniz's famous natural lava pools (free guest access year-round). Modern rooms with Atlantic views, hot tub, and friendly service. Best north coast base.

name: Aqua Natura Madeira Hotel
highlight: Elegant 4-star perched on the rugged northwest coast with Atlantic Ocean views. Sister property to Aqua Natura Bay with its own restaurant and coastal atmosphere.

name: Hotel Euro Moniz
highlight: Affordable 3-star near the natural pools with indoor pool, restaurant, and bar. Good budget base for exploring Porto Moniz and the northwest coast.

name: Quinta do Furão
highlight: Spectacular cliffside hotel on 5 acres of organic gardens with dramatic north-coast views. Pool, sauna, and direct access to levada trails. Best-rated property in Santana.

name: Hotel O Colmo
highlight: Central Santana location near traditional thatched houses. 50 rooms, heated pool, jacuzzi, and restaurant. Friendly staff and convenient for north coast exploration.

name: Dreams Madeira Resort Spa & Marina
highlight: Part of Hyatt's World of Dreams. Clifftop resort with marina, spa, multiple pools, and panoramic views of Desertas Islands. Secluded east coast location near Ponta de São Lourenço.

name: Dom Pedro Madeira
highlight: 4-star in Machico bay with panoramic sea views and Desertas Islands vistas. Near sandy beach, 10 minutes from airport. Live music and waterfront dining.

name: Albatroz Beach & Yacht Club
highlight: 5-star beachfront near the airport with yacht club facilities, pools, and spa. Couples rate it 9.4. Excellent base for east coast exploration and Ponta de São Lourenço.

name: Estalagem do Vale
highlight: Historic country-house inn in the Laurissilva Forest valley (UNESCO World Heritage). Indoor/outdoor pools, restaurant with €20 set dinner menu. Genuine nature retreat.

name: Estalagem do Mar
highlight: 99-room hotel in the centre of São Vicente with 2 outdoor pools, tennis court, sauna, and restaurant. Close to volcanic caves. Good mid-range north coast option.

name: Casa da Piedade
highlight: Charming guesthouse on the spectacular north coast with Wi-Fi and warm hospitality. Consistently praised as 'the best' by guests. Walking distance to São Vicente centre and volcanic caves.

name: North Coast Guest House (Madeira Surf Lodge)
highlight: Recently renovated 8-room guesthouse 1km from centre with mountain views, garden, free WiFi and parking. Budget-friendly surf-oriented base on the north coast.

name: Jaca Hostel
highlight: Best-rated hostel in Funchal, housed in a 19th-century family home. Garden, bar, inner yard, and 1-minute walk to city hall. Cozy vibe with excellent social atmosphere.

name: 29 Madeira Hostel
highlight: Clean and comfortable hostel in central Funchal with exceptional staff. Dorms and private rooms available. Walking distance to all major attractions and transport.

name: Santa Maria Hostel
highlight: Renovated historic building in Old Town retaining original Madeiran box roofs and wood beams. Close to beach, painted doors, and all city sights. Social atmosphere.

name: Casa do Papagaio Verde
highlight: Affordable guesthouse on Funchal outskirts with sea views, beautiful garden, homemade jam breakfast, and some rooms with cooking facilities. Warm, welcoming owners.

name: A Casa Do Caseiro
highlight: 8 rooms with private balconies and panoramic Funchal Bay views. Swimming pool, snack bar, and peaceful residential setting in Santa Luzia, 1.6 miles from centre.

name: Dazkarizeh73
highlight: Exotic boutique hotel with outdoor infinity pool and hot tub with ocean views. Fitness centre, snack bar, and unique design aesthetic on the south coast between Funchal and Calheta.
